aries.name: Aries
sketch: Aries perfects the art of beginning. A thought sparks and they're already moving—that unthinking courage is both their gift and their burden.
Honest to a fault and allergic to detours; the flip side is just as plain: thin patience, quick to change course halfway.
aries.love: Makes the first move, runs hot then cool. Needs someone who can catch the rush and still slow them down.
aries.work: A born starter, built for zero-to-one. Hand the finish line to someone steadier and they'll go further.

taurus.name: Taurus
sketch: Taurus trusts what can be seen and touched. They're slow, but slow with direction—and nearly immovable once set.
Dependable to the core, stubborn and comfort-loving on the other side. Change is never an easy thing for them.
taurus.love: Shows love through steadiness and presence, not sweet talk. Give them safety and their loyalty runs deep.
taurus.work: Builds things to last, endures repetition and the long game. Best where quality compounds over time.

gemini.name: Gemini
sketch: Gemini keeps several windows open at once. They meet the world with a child's curiosity, switching topics and tastes at speed.
Sharp, quick, articulate—but easily three-minutes-hot, with breadth often winning out over depth.
gemini.love: Warms up through talk and novelty; boredom is the real enemy. Needs a mind to spar with and room to roam.
gemini.work: Thrives in information, communication and ideas. Brightest juggling many threads; monotony drains them.

cancer.name: Cancer
sketch: Cancer speaks in feeling first. They remember the preference you mentioned in passing and hold home and their people above all.
Sensitivity is their radar and their soft spot—moods run high, and a wound can send them into the shell for a long while.
cancer.love: Devoted and in it for the long haul, longing to be needed. Offer commitment and they'll guard you with everything.
cancer.work: Most at ease in a small, trusted team. Gifted at caring for people and keeping the bonds intact.

leo.name: Leo
sketch: Leo walks in and the light follows. Generous and warm, they were born needing a stage and an answering gaze.
Confidence is the charm and the load—being overlooked stings deeper than they let on.
leo.love: Loud and loyal, loves on a grand scale. Needs admiration and respect, and can't abide indifference.
leo.work: A natural leader and performer, built for roles that need presence. Give them the spotlight and they give their all.

virgo.name: Virgo
sketch: Virgo sees the detail everyone else misses. They answer chaos with discernment and treat 'do it better' as instinct.
Reliable, meticulous, willing—but prone to self-reproach. Letting themselves off the hook is the lifelong lesson.
virgo.love: Loves through acts and care, understated and solid. Wants the effort seen, not the fault-finding felt.
virgo.work: Untangles complexity and guards the quality. Built for roles that demand precision and responsibility.

libra.name: Libra
sketch: Libra is wired for balance and beauty. They care about fairness in a relationship and put everyone at ease.
Elegant and diplomatic, yet often undecided because 'both sides have a point'—people-pleasing and hesitation are one coin.
libra.love: Romantic and relationship-first, afraid of being alone. Needs a partner to decide and share the weight with.
libra.work: Skilled at coordination, negotiation and taste. At home in roles that balance many parties.

scorpio.name: Scorpio
sketch: Scorpio lives below the surface. Feelings run thick and will runs deep—once in, it's all in: never love or love completely.
Fiercely perceptive and fiercely private; suspicion and obsession are the undercurrents they must learn to tame.
scorpio.love: Profound and singular, asking for a soul-level handover. Betrayal is the one unforgivable thing.
scorpio.work: Built to dig in and crack the hard problems—the tougher, the better. Made for focus and depth.

sagittarius.name: Sagittarius
sketch: Sagittarius forever faces the horizon. They want freedom, meaning and the view they haven't seen yet—optimistic to the point of naivety.
Frank and adventurous, yet quick to promise more than they deliver. Rein the stride in and the distance gets closer.
sagittarius.love: Loves freedom, dreads the leash. Needs someone to hit the road with, not someone to tie them down.
sagittarius.work: Built for exploration, crossover and vision. Repetition and constraint make them bolt.

capricorn.name: Capricorn
sketch: Capricorn makes time an ally. Clear-eyed and disciplined to the edge of cold, they believe the mountain is climbed one step at a time.
Dependable and load-bearing, yet apt to carry duty into loneliness—remember, there's a view before the summit too.
capricorn.love: Reserved and lasting, trading sweet words for shouldering things. Slow to warm, rock-solid once sure.
capricorn.work: A born long-term builder who outlasts the quiet stretches. Made for roles that need persistence and duty.

aquarius.name: Aquarius
sketch: Aquarius feels posted in from the future. Independent and rational, they love breaking the mold—caring about humankind from a slight distance.
Forward and principled, yet apt to seem aloof. Warmth is their required course with the world.
aquarius.love: Values a meeting of minds over dependence, and needs room. Loves someone who's a friend and respects independence.
aquarius.work: Suited to innovation, tech and social questions. Most creative where they're free to range.

pisces.name: Pisces
sketch: Pisces lives in the tides of feeling and imagination. Deeply empathic, gentle and artistic—though the edges often blur.
Kind and accepting, but prone to escape and self-dissolving. Learning to come ashore keeps the dream from drowning them.
pisces.love: Romantic and selfless, longing for souls to merge. Needs someone gentle yet clear who can offer direction.
pisces.work: Suited to creative, healing and expressive work. Shines brightest when understood and supported.
